channel.title: Build a RAG Agent with Knowledge Bases on Example Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Build a RAG Agent with Knowledge Bases on Example Academy

item.title: Build a RAG Agent with Knowledge Bases
item.description:
Introduction 🔗

In this challenge you will build a retrieval-augmented (RAG) agent on the DigitalOcean Gradient AI Platform. You will create an agent, build a knowledge base from your own data, attach it, and confirm that answers are grounded with citations that trace back to your sources.

RAG lets an agent answer from private, up-to-date, domain-specific data instead of relying only on the base model’s training. The knowledge base handles chunking, embeddings, indexing, and retrieval for you.

item.title: Build a RAG Agent with Knowledge Bases — Exam
